description: Contraste: lectura dialógica — mismo niño ahora activo, hablando, gesticulando, color cálido
prompt_string: Cinematic 9:16 vertical video, same couch same room as previous clip but now the 4-year-old Chilean boy is leaning forward actively talking and gesticulating with hands pointing at the illustrated storybook, bright engaged eyes looking at his mother, mouth open mid-sentence, animated body language showing cognitive activation, warm color grade with Fuji Eterna film look at 4000K warm temperature, slightly more saturated than previous clip, slow push-in camera movement toward child's face, mother visible in soft focus listening intently, golden warm lamp light mixing with natural window light, documentary intimate style, authentic Chilean family home
negative_prompt: passive child, still hands, neutral expression, cool tones, desaturated, stock footage, studio lighting, cartoon, plastic skin, 6 fingers, forced acting, oversaturated
